entity.summary: South Korean centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by Dunamu and launched in October 2017. Upbit remained active after a November 2025 Solana-related abnormal-withdrawal incident, with customer losses covered and normal exchange, deposit, and withdrawal functions continuing afterward.
entity.notes: The stored launch marker remains month-level because Dunamu's official company history establishes October 2017 but not one exact day. Existing November 2025 incident, suspension, reimbursement, and staged-restoration events are not duplicated in this bundle.

expected.summary: South Korean centralized exchange operated by Dunamu. In November 2025 it suffered a Solana hot-wallet / abnormal withdrawal incident involving roughly USD 30-40 million in assets, suspended deposits and withdrawals, and later resumed Solana-related services in phases.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. The 2025 Solana incident was severe, but reporting and exchange notices describe reimbursement, suspended transfers, and staged resumption rather than terminal closure.

evidence.title: Dunamu blockchain services: Upbit
evidence.notes: Dunamu states that Upbit launched in October 2017 and identifies it as the company's digital-asset exchange service.

evidence.title: Upbit deposit and withdrawal limits after customer verification
evidence.notes: Current first-party support documentation confirms active fiat and digital-asset deposit and withdrawal functionality.
